item_titles: [AINews] OpenAI launches GPT 5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna, Codex becomes ChatGPT superapp
OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
OpenAI staffer maps out which of GPT-5.6 Sol's five reasoning levels fits which task complexity
OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
[AINews] not much happened today
OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol autonomously post-trained the smaller Luna model with a "fairly underspecified prompt"
clusters.summary: OpenAI正式发布GPT-5.6系列模型（Sol/Terra/Luna），GPT-5.6成为微软Copilot 365首选模型；新模型具备五级推理能力，并展示了自主微调小模型和解决复杂数学问题的能力。
clusters.title: OpenAI发布GPT-5.6系列模型及ChatGPT Work

item_titles: GPT-5.6一小时解开50年数学猜想，700词Prompt驾驭64个子Agent
OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra reportedly solves a 50-year-old math problem in under an hour
clusters.summary: 据报道，OpenAI的GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra模型利用64个子智能体并行工作，在不到一小时内证明了悬而未决50年的Cycle Double Cover猜想。
clusters.title: GPT-5.6在一小时内解决50年数学猜想

item_titles: Karpathy LLM Wiki (Obsidian Plugin)

clusters.title: OpenAI发力家庭场景，ChatGPT深入家庭生活

item_titles: Quoting OpenAI
OpenAI admits it "didn't get everything quite right" with ChatGPT Work launch and scrambles to fix UX and costs
clusters.summary: OpenAI承认ChatGPT Work和GPT-5.6 Sol发布时存在计算量过大、桌面端过渡混乱及成本等问题，正努力修复用户体验。
clusters.title: OpenAI承认ChatGPT Work上线存在问题并紧急修复

item_titles: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly running a "coordinated campaign" to steal trade secrets through poached employees
clusters.summary: 苹果公司提起诉讼，指控OpenAI通过系统性挖角超过400名前苹果员工，窃取了与未发布产品相关的商业机密。
clusters.title: 苹果起诉OpenAI涉嫌窃取商业机密

item_titles: Wealthy AI workers send San Francisco house prices soaring

clusters.title: AI财富效应对经济的影响

item_titles: Banning AI in Law School: We've Seen This Before

clusters.title: 法学院禁止使用AI：历史重演

item_titles: The AI Disagreement Index: 8 models agreed on the "best tool" 0 of 16 times
clusters.summary: 一项测试显示，8个AI模型在16次“最佳工具”选择测试中没有任何一次达成一致。
clusters.title: AI分歧指数：模型在工具选择上难以达成一致

item_titles: Show HN: Sqlsure – deterministic semantic checks for AI-generated SQL

item_titles: Show HN: Catch your local LLM falling back to CPU

clusters.title: Picchio：检测本地LLM回退至CPU运行的工具

item_titles: Terrorist groups are using every major AI chatbot for attack planning and weapons development
clusters.summary: 剑桥大学一项研究发现，博科圣地和ISIS等恐怖组织正利用ChatGPT等主流AI聊天机器人策划袭击和开发武器。
clusters.title: 恐怖组织利用主流AI聊天机器人策划袭击

item_titles: The Silent Epidemic of LLM Technical Debt

clusters.title: LLM技术债务的隐性流行病

item_titles: Show HN: verbatimeter - check how grounded your LLM / RAG agent is in real-time

clusters.title: Verbatimeter：实时检查LLM/RAG智能体依据的工具

item_titles: China's Orca world model matches specialized robotics systems without ever seeing a single action label

item_titles: Meta's Muse Spark 1.1 outperforms GLM-5.2 in coding and costs slightly less

clusters.title: Meta发布Muse Spark 1.1模型，编码能力超越GLM-5.2

item_titles: Better tools made Copilot code review worse. Here’s how we actually improved it.
